# grāmatr for Gemini CLI

Your memory, preferences, and projects — carried across every AI tool you use.
This extension brings grāmatr to Gemini CLI.

## Install

```bash
npx @gramatr/mcp setup gemini
```

Or copy `gemini-extension.json` to `~/.gemini/extensions/gramatr/gemini-extension.json`.

## Version

0.20.10
